title: LLM as World Model: Research Experiemnt
description: We want to evaluate the capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) usin Qwen to serve as predictive "world models" for natural disaster impact assessment. Specifically, we want to simulate how human populations perceive and report earthquake shaking intensity (Modified Mercalli Intensity, or MMI) during the (2019 Ridgecrest Earthquake (M 7.1)).
